```{=html}
<style>
.reveal section.chiral-slab-slide .columns {
  gap: 1rem;
}

.reveal section.chiral-slab-slide .chiral-slab-text {
  font-size: 0.64em;
  line-height: 1.14;
}

.reveal section.chiral-slab-slide .chiral-slab-text li {
  margin-bottom: 0.28rem;
}

.reveal section.chiral-slab-slide .chiral-slab-text .math.display {
  margin: 0.2rem 0 0;
  font-size: 0.78em;
}

.chiral-slab-scattering {
  width: min(100%, 820px);
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.chiral-slab-controls {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
  color: #f6fbff;
  font-family: var(--r-main-font, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif);
  font-size: 0.44em;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.chiral-slab-controls input[type="range"] {
  width: 100%;
  accent-color: #ffd166;
}

.chiral-slab-readout {
  color: #ffd166;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.chiral-slab-scattering svg {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  max-height: 500px;
}

.chiral-slab-scattering text {
  font-family: var(--r-main-font, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.slab-bg {
  fill: rgba(2, 7, 14, 0.76);
  stroke: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.24);
  stroke-width: 2;
}

.slab-layer {
  fill: rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.13);
  stroke: rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.64);
  stroke-width: 2;
}

.slab-boundary {
  stroke: rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.82);
  stroke-width: 2;
  stroke-dasharray: 6 7;
}

.slab-axis,
.slab-lane {
  stroke: rgba(246, 251, 255, 0.28);
  stroke-width: 2;
  stroke-linecap: round;
}

.slab-axis {
  stroke: rgba(246, 251, 255, 0.4);
}

.slab-title {
  fill: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.slab-label {
  fill: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.slab-formula-label {
  fill: #ffd166;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.slab-wave-r,
.slab-wave-l {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 4.2;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
}

.slab-wave-r {
  stroke: #8ec5ff;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.55));
}

.slab-wave-l {
  stroke: #ffd166;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.58));
}

.slab-arrow-r,
.slab-arrow-l {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  marker-end: url("#slab-arrow-head-blue");
}

.slab-arrow-r {
  stroke: #8ec5ff;
}

.slab-arrow-l {
  stroke: #ffd166;
  marker-end: url("#slab-arrow-head-gold");
}

.slab-numeric-panel {
  fill: rgba(2, 7, 14, 0.68);
  stroke: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.18);
  stroke-width: 1.5;
}

.slab-numeric {
  fill: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.slab-numeric .accent {
  fill: #ffd166;
}
</style>

<div class="chiral-slab-scattering" data-energy="1.22" data-mass="1">
  <div class="chiral-slab-controls">
    <span>condensate width</span>
    <input type="range" min="0.10" max="8.00" step="0.02" value="3.20" aria-label="Condensate layer width in inverse mass units" data-slab-width>
    <span class="chiral-slab-readout">m<sub>0</sub>a = <span data-width-value>3.20</span></span>
  </div>

  <svg viewBox="0 0 820 480" role="img" aria-label="Exact scattering of right and left chiral waves on a finite Higgs condensate layer.">
    <defs>
      <marker id="slab-arrow-head-blue" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#8ec5ff"/>
      </marker>
      <marker id="slab-arrow-head-gold" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#ffd166"/>
      </marker>
    </defs>

    <rect class="slab-bg" x="14" y="16" width="792" height="438" rx="8"/>

    <text class="slab-title" x="38" y="52">exact stationary scattering</text>
    <text class="slab-label" x="38" y="76">two incoming waves, same energy</text>

    <rect class="slab-layer" data-layer x="314" y="92" width="144" height="250" rx="6"/>
    <line class="slab-boundary" data-left-boundary x1="314" y1="90" x2="314" y2="352"/>
    <line class="slab-boundary" data-right-boundary x1="458" y1="90" x2="458" y2="352"/>
    <text class="slab-formula-label" data-layer-label x="340" y="116">m(x)=m&#8320;</text>
    <text class="slab-label" data-width-label x="350" y="336">a</text>

    <line class="slab-axis" x1="52" y1="360" x2="768" y2="360"/>
    <text class="slab-label" x="754" y="382">x</text>

    <line class="slab-lane" x1="52" y1="172" x2="768" y2="172"/>
    <line class="slab-lane" x1="52" y1="252" x2="768" y2="252"/>
    <text class="slab-formula-label" x="36" y="178">R</text>
    <text class="slab-formula-label" x="36" y="258">L</text>

    <path class="slab-wave-r" data-wave-r/>
    <path class="slab-wave-l" data-wave-l/>

    <path class="slab-arrow-r" d="M 92 118 L 154 118"/>
    <path class="slab-arrow-l" d="M 728 300 L 666 300"/>
    <text class="slab-label" x="90" y="106">incoming R</text>
    <text class="slab-label" x="650" y="286">incoming L</text>

    <rect class="slab-numeric-panel" x="500" y="36" width="280" height="102" rx="8"/>
    <text class="slab-numeric" x="518" y="62">E/m&#8320; = <tspan data-energy-value>1.22</tspan></text>
    <text class="slab-numeric" x="518" y="87">q/m&#8320; = <tspan data-q-value>0.69</tspan>,  v<tspan baseline-shift="sub">g</tspan> = <tspan data-v-value>0.57</tspan></text>
    <text class="slab-numeric" x="518" y="112">one incoming R:</text>
    <text class="slab-numeric" x="518" y="132">|r|² = <tspan data-r2-value>0.00</tspan>,  |t|² = <tspan data-t2-value>1.00</tspan></text>
  </svg>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const roots = document.querySelectorAll(".chiral-slab-scattering:not([data-slab-ready])");

  const C = {
    add: (a, b) => ({ re: a.re + b.re, im: a.im + b.im }),
    sub: (a, b) => ({ re: a.re - b.re, im: a.im - b.im }),
    mul: (a, b) => ({ re: a.re * b.re - a.im * b.im, im: a.re * b.im + a.im * b.re }),
    scale: (a, s) => ({ re: a.re * s, im: a.im * s }),
    div: (a, b) => {
      const d = b.re * b.re + b.im * b.im || 1;
      return { re: (a.re * b.re + a.im * b.im) / d, im: (a.im * b.re - a.re * b.im) / d };
    },
    expi: (x) => ({ re: Math.cos(x), im: Math.sin(x) }),
    abs2: (a) => a.re * a.re + a.im * a.im
  };

  function pathFromPoints(points) {
    return points.map((point, index) => `${index === 0 ? "M" : "L"} ${point.x.toFixed(2)} ${point.y.toFixed(2)}`).join(" ");
  }

  function coefficients(E, m, a) {
    const q = Math.sqrt(Math.max(E * E - m * m, 0));
    const aq = q * a;
    const alphaPlus = (E - q) / m;
    const alphaMinus = (E + q) / m;
    const ep = C.expi(aq);
    const em = C.expi(-aq);
    const A = { re: 1, im: 0 };
    const B = { re: 1, im: 0 };

    const numerator = C.sub(B, C.scale(em, alphaMinus));
    const denominator = C.sub(C.scale(ep, alphaPlus), C.scale(em, alphaMinus));
    const insideRight = C.div(numerator, denominator);
    const insideLeft = C.sub(A, insideRight);
    const outLeft = C.add(C.scale(insideRight, alphaPlus), C.scale(insideLeft, alphaMinus));
    const outRight = C.add(C.mul(insideRight, ep), C.mul(insideLeft, em));

    const denom = { re: q * Math.cos(aq), im: -E * Math.sin(aq) };
    const r = C.div({ re: 0, im: -m * Math.sin(aq) }, denom);
    const t = C.div(C.scale(C.expi(-E * a), q), denom);

    return {
      q,
      alphaPlus,
      alphaMinus,
      insideRight,
      insideLeft,
      outLeft,
      outRight,
      r,
      t,
      r2: C.abs2(r),
      t2: C.abs2(t)
    };
  }

  function makeMapper(a) {
    const xMin = -4.2;
    const xMax = 8.2 + 4.2;
    const left = 52;
    const right = 768;
    return {
      xMin,
      xMax,
      toScreen: (x) => left + ((x - xMin) / (xMax - xMin)) * (right - left)
    };
  }

  function fieldAt(x, E, a, coeffs) {
    const A = { re: 1, im: 0 };
    const B = { re: 1, im: 0 };
    const q = coeffs.q;

    if (x < 0) {
      return {
        R: C.mul(A, C.expi(E * x)),
        L: C.mul(coeffs.outLeft, C.expi(-E * x))
      };
    }

    if (x > a) {
      return {
        R: C.mul(coeffs.outRight, C.expi(E * (x - a))),
        L: C.mul(B, C.expi(-E * (x - a)))
      };
    }

    const ep = C.expi(q * x);
    const em = C.expi(-q * x);
    return {
      R: C.add(C.mul(coeffs.insideRight, ep), C.mul(coeffs.insideLeft, em)),
      L: C.add(C.scale(C.mul(coeffs.insideRight, ep), coeffs.alphaPlus), C.scale(C.mul(coeffs.insideLeft, em), coeffs.alphaMinus))
    };
  }

  function updateGeometry(root, a) {
    const mapper = makeMapper(a);
    const x0 = mapper.toScreen(0);
    const x1 = mapper.toScreen(a);
    const layer = root.querySelector("[data-layer]");
    const leftBoundary = root.querySelector("[data-left-boundary]");
    const rightBoundary = root.querySelector("[data-right-boundary]");
    const layerLabel = root.querySelector("[data-layer-label]");
    const widthLabel = root.querySelector("[data-width-label]");

    layer.setAttribute("x", x0.toFixed(2));
    layer.setAttribute("width", Math.max(3, x1 - x0).toFixed(2));
    leftBoundary.setAttribute("x1", x0.toFixed(2));
    leftBoundary.setAttribute("x2", x0.toFixed(2));
    rightBoundary.setAttribute("x1", x1.toFixed(2));
    rightBoundary.setAttribute("x2", x1.toFixed(2));
    layerLabel.setAttribute("x", (x0 + 12).toFixed(2));
    widthLabel.setAttribute("x", ((x0 + x1) / 2).toFixed(2));
  }

  function updateReadouts(root, a, E, m, coeffs) {
    const q = coeffs.q;
    const v = q / E;
    root.querySelector("[data-width-value]").textContent = a.toFixed(2);
    root.querySelector("[data-energy-value]").textContent = (E / m).toFixed(2);
    root.querySelector("[data-q-value]").textContent = (q / m).toFixed(2);
    root.querySelector("[data-v-value]").textContent = v.toFixed(2);
    root.querySelector("[data-r2-value]").textContent = coeffs.r2.toFixed(2);
    root.querySelector("[data-t2-value]").textContent = coeffs.t2.toFixed(2);
  }

  function drawFields(root, t) {
    const E = Number(root.dataset.energy);
    const m = Number(root.dataset.mass);
    const a = Number(root.querySelector("[data-slab-width]").value);
    const coeffs = coefficients(E, m, a);
    const mapper = makeMapper(a);
    const time = C.expi(-E * t);
    const samples = 240;
    const rBase = 172;
    const lBase = 252;
    const raw = [];

    for (let i = 0; i <= samples; i += 1) {
      const u = i / samples;
      const x = mapper.xMin + (mapper.xMax - mapper.xMin) * u;
      const fields = fieldAt(x, E, a, coeffs);
      const rValue = C.mul(fields.R, time).re;
      const lValue = C.mul(fields.L, time).re;
      raw.push({ x, rValue, lValue });
    }

    const amp = 16;
    const rPoints = raw.map((point) => ({ x: mapper.toScreen(point.x), y: rBase - amp * point.rValue }));
    const lPoints = raw.map((point) => ({ x: mapper.toScreen(point.x), y: lBase - amp * point.lValue }));
    root.querySelector("[data-wave-r]").setAttribute("d", pathFromPoints(rPoints));
    root.querySelector("[data-wave-l]").setAttribute("d", pathFromPoints(lPoints));

    updateGeometry(root, a);
    updateReadouts(root, a, E, m, coeffs);
  }

  function animate(root, startTime) {
    const tick = (now) => {
      drawFields(root, (now - startTime) / 1000);
      window.requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    tick(startTime);
  }

  roots.forEach((root) => {
    root.dataset.slabReady = "true";
    root.querySelector("[data-slab-width]").addEventListener("input", () => {
      drawFields(root, performance.now() / 1000);
    });
    animate(root, performance.now());
  });
})();
</script>
```
